name: dsp-sf-agent-deployment
description: DSP skill for deploying an Agentforce shopper agent to a Storefront Next storefront via MIAW — Messaging Session, Embedded Service Deployment, and the storefront-side integration with its prechat identity bridge.

plugins.name: dsp-sf-agent-deployment
plugins.description: Step-by-step procedure to wire an Agentforce agent to a B2C Commerce Storefront Next storefront: MIAW messaging channel + Omni-Channel Flow routing, Embedded Service Deployment + code snippet, and the storefront integration (single-JSON commerceAgent env var, CSP, ✨ header launcher incl. custom shells, commercecloud-alias domain gotcha, MRT deploy, prechat identity bridge). Field-tested end-to-end against zzse-258/261 / storm orgs.
